# AutoCalcHub

> Free car calculators and guides to help you make smarter decisions when buying, financing, and owning a vehicle. All tools are free, no signup required.

## About This Site

- [About AutoCalcHub](https://autocalchub.com/about.html): Who we are and what we do.
- [How We Calculate](https://autocalchub.com/methodology.html): The formulas, assumptions, and data sources (Experian, Bankrate, Edmunds, EIA, KBB) behind every calculator on the site.
- [Editorial Policy](https://autocalchub.com/editorial-policy.html): How content is created, reviewed, and updated, and how advertising is kept separate from editorial content.

## Tools

- [Car Loan Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-loan-calculator.html): Calculate your monthly car payment, total interest, and full loan cost based on price, APR, and term.
- [Car Affordability Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-affordability-calculator.html): Find out how much car you can afford based on your income, expenses, and the 20/4/10 rule.
- [Car Down Payment Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-down-payment-calculator.html): See how different down payment amounts affect your monthly payment, total interest, and equity position at purchase.
- [Car Maintenance Cost Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-maintenance-cost-calculator.html): Estimate your annual car maintenance budget based on your vehicle's make type, age, and mileage.
- [Car Depreciation Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-depreciation-calculator.html): Estimate how much your car loses in value over time and what it will be worth at any point in the future.
- [Used Car Value Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/used-car-value-calculator.html): Estimate the current market value of a used vehicle based on year, mileage, condition, and model.
- [Car Insurance Estimator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-insurance-estimator.html): Estimate your monthly car insurance cost based on your profile, vehicle, and coverage level.
- [Car Lease vs Buy Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-lease-vs-buy-calculator.html): Compare the true total cost of leasing versus buying a car over any time period.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/fuel-cost-calculator.html): Calculate how much you spend on gas per month or year based on your mileage and MPG.
- [MPG Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/mpg-calculator.html): Calculate your car's real-world fuel efficiency from fill-up data.
- [Gas vs EV Savings Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/gas-vs-ev-savings-calculator.html): Compare the total cost of driving a gas car versus an electric vehicle including fuel, charging, and maintenance.
- [EV Charging Cost Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/ev-charging-cost-calculator.html): Calculate the monthly and annual cost of charging an electric vehicle at home.
- [Road Trip Cost Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/road-trip-cost-calculator.html): Estimate the total fuel cost for any road trip based on distance, MPG, and current gas prices.
- [Car Sales Tax Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-sales-tax-calculator.html): Calculate car sales tax for any US state instantly, including trade-in deductions.
- [Car Trade-In Value Estimator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-trade-in-value-estimator.html): Estimate what a dealer will offer for your car vs. private party value.
- [GAP Insurance Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/gap-insurance-calculator.html): Find out if you're underwater on your car loan and whether GAP insurance makes financial sense.
- [Car Refinance Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-refinance-calculator.html): See how much you could save by refinancing your car loan — monthly savings, total interest saved, and break-even point.
- [Car Early Payoff Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-early-payoff-calculator.html): Calculate how much interest you save and how many months you cut by making extra payments on your car loan.
- [Car Total Cost of Ownership Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/car-total-cost-of-ownership-calculator.html): Calculate the true 5-year cost of owning a car including purchase price, loan interest, insurance, fuel, maintenance, and depreciation.
- [Negative Equity Rollover Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/negative-equity-rollover-calculator.html): Calculate exactly how much extra interest and monthly payment you take on by rolling negative equity from your current loan into a new one.
- [Bi-Weekly Car Payment Calculator](https://autocalchub.com/tools/biweekly-car-payment-calculator.html): Calculate how much interest and time you save by switching your car loan to bi-weekly payments instead of monthly payments.

## Guides: Buying a Car

- [How Much Car Can I Afford?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-car-can-i-afford.html): How to figure out your real car budget using income, debt, and the 20/4/10 rule.
- [How to Buy a Used Car Without Getting Ripped Off](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-buy-used-car-without-getting-ripped-off.html): Step-by-step guide to buying a used car safely and avoiding common scams.
- [Best Time of Year to Buy a Car](https://autocalchub.com/blog/best-time-of-year-to-buy-a-car.html): When dealers offer the biggest discounts and how to time your purchase.
- [Should I Buy or Lease a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/should-i-buy-or-lease-a-car.html): A clear breakdown of when buying wins and when leasing makes more sense financially.
- [How to Negotiate Car Price at a Dealership](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-negotiate-car-price-at-dealership.html): Tactics for getting a lower price and avoiding common dealer tricks.
- [How to Check a Car's History Before Buying](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-check-car-history-before-buying.html): What reports to pull, what red flags to look for, and what they don't tell you.
- [Is It Worth Buying a Car With a Rebuilt Title?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/is-it-worth-buying-car-with-rebuilt-title.html): The real risks of rebuilt title vehicles and what to check before you buy.
- [Selling Your Car Privately vs Trading In](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-sell-car-privately-vs-trade-in.html): Which option gets you more money and when the convenience of a trade-in is worth it.

## Guides: Car Financing

- [Should You Pay Cash or Finance a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/should-you-pay-cash-or-finance-a-car.html): The opportunity-cost math for paying cash vs financing, and when 0% APR beats paying cash outright.
- [What Credit Score Do You Need to Buy a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-credit-score-do-you-need-to-buy-a-car.html): How your credit score affects your interest rate and what to do if your score is low.
- [What Is a Good Interest Rate on a Car Loan?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-good-interest-rate-car-loan.html): Average auto loan rates in 2026 by credit score tier and how to get the best deal.
- [How to Pay Off a Car Loan Early](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-pay-off-car-loan-early.html): Strategies to pay off your auto loan faster and how much interest you can save.
- [Is a 72-Month Car Loan a Bad Idea?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/is-72-month-car-loan-bad-idea.html): The real cost of long loan terms and when a shorter term is worth the higher payment.
- [How to Get Pre-Approved for a Car Loan](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-get-pre-approved-car-loan.html): Step-by-step guide to getting pre-approved before you walk into a dealership.
- [How Long Does It Take to Pay Off a Car Loan?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-long-does-it-take-to-pay-off-car-loan.html): How loan term affects total cost and how to choose the right payoff timeline.
- [How Much Should You Put Down on a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-should-i-put-down-on-a-car.html): The 20/4/10 rule, new vs. used car guidelines, and what happens when you put too little down.
- [How to Refinance a Car Loan](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-refinance-a-car-loan.html): When refinancing makes sense, how much you can save, and the step-by-step process.
- [What Is Negative Equity on a Car Loan?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-negative-equity-on-a-car-loan.html): How negative equity happens, how to calculate it, and the real ways to fix it.
- [Should You Roll Negative Equity Into a New Car Loan?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/should-you-roll-negative-equity-into-a-new-car-loan.html): The real cost of rolling negative equity forward, and the alternatives worth considering first.
- [What Is Loan-to-Value (LTV) Ratio?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-loan-to-value-ratio-car-loan.html): How lenders use LTV to set your car loan approval odds, interest rate, and refinancing options.
- [Bi-Weekly vs Monthly Car Payments](https://autocalchub.com/blog/biweekly-vs-monthly-car-payments.html): How bi-weekly car payments save interest automatically compared to monthly payments, and which loans benefit most.
- [How to Set Up Bi-Weekly Car Payments With Your Lender](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-set-up-biweekly-car-payments.html): Step-by-step guide to setting up bi-weekly car loan payments, what to ask your lender, and how to do it yourself for free.

## Guides: Running Costs

- [How Much Does It Cost to Own a Car Per Month?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-own-car-per-month.html): Full breakdown of monthly car ownership costs including payment, insurance, gas, and maintenance.
- [How to Improve Car Gas Mileage](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-improve-car-gas-mileage.html): Practical tips to get better MPG and reduce your fuel costs.
- [How to Calculate Fuel Cost for a Road Trip](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-calculate-fuel-cost-road-trip.html): How to estimate gas costs for any trip before you leave.
- [What Is the Cheapest Car to Maintain?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-cheapest-car-to-maintain.html): Which vehicles have the lowest long-term maintenance costs and why.
- [How Much Does Car Maintenance Cost Per Year?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-does-car-maintenance-cost-per-year.html): A full 2026 breakdown of annual maintenance costs by vehicle age, make type, and service category.
- [How to Lower Your Car Insurance Premium](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-lower-your-car-insurance-premium.html): The most effective ways to reduce your car insurance bill — from deductible adjustments to discounts most drivers never ask about.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Fill Up a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-does-it-cost-to-fill-up-a-car.html): What a full tank costs in 2026 by vehicle type and tank size.

## Guides: Electric Vehicles

- [Electric vs Gas Car: True Cost Comparison](https://autocalchub.com/blog/electric-vs-gas-car-true-cost.html): A full cost comparison of EVs vs gas cars including purchase price, fuel, insurance, and maintenance.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Charge an EV at Home?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-does-ev-cost-to-charge-at-home.html): How to calculate your actual home charging cost based on your electricity rate and battery size.
- [EV Tax Credit 2026](https://autocalchub.com/blog/ev-tax-credit-2026.html): Which electric vehicles qualify for the federal EV tax credit in 2026 and how to claim it.

## Guides: Car Ownership & Value

- [Which Cars Hold Their Value the Best?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/which-cars-hold-value-best.html): The vehicles with the best resale value in 2026 and which to avoid if depreciation matters to you.
- [How Much Does a New Car Depreciate in Year One?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-does-new-car-depreciate-first-year.html): How fast new cars lose value and what it means for your buying decision.
- [What Mileage Is Too High for a Used Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-mileage-is-too-high-for-a-used-car.html): What the odometer actually tells you and what matters more when evaluating a used car.
- [When Should You Trade In Your Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/when-to-trade-in-your-car.html): The right timing to trade in, how to avoid negative equity, and how to get a fair offer.
- [How Car Depreciation Affects Resale Value](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-does-car-depreciation-affect-resale-value.html): What accelerates depreciation, what slows it, and how to use the depreciation curve to your advantage when buying or selling.

## Guides: Car Buying (Additional)

- [How Much Should I Spend on a Car Based on My Salary?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-much-should-i-spend-on-a-car-based-on-salary.html): Income-based car budgets for $40K, $60K, $80K, and $100K salaries with real monthly breakdowns and down payment targets.
- [What Is a Good Monthly Car Payment?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-a-good-car-payment-per-month.html): How to find the right car payment for your income level, with benchmarks and interest rate comparisons.
- [Hidden Fees When Buying a Car: What Dealers Don't Tell You](https://autocalchub.com/blog/hidden-fees-when-buying-a-car.html): A full breakdown of dealer fees — which are required, which are negotiable, and which to refuse entirely.
- [What Is a Good MPG for a Car?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-is-a-good-mpg-for-a-car.html): MPG benchmarks by vehicle type for 2026 — what counts as good, average, or poor fuel economy and how to calculate your real-world MPG.

## Guides: Car Ownership (Additional)

- [How to Minimize Car Depreciation](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-minimize-car-depreciation.html): Practical strategies to slow your car's depreciation and protect resale value — from choosing the right vehicle to maintenance, mileage management, and timing your sale.

## Guides: Financing (Additional)

- [How Does Car Loan Interest Work?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-does-car-loan-interest-work.html): Simple interest, amortization, and why early payments are mostly interest — explained with a real month-by-month breakdown and practical strategies for borrowers.
- [How to Get Out of a Car Lease Early](https://autocalchub.com/blog/how-to-get-out-of-a-car-lease-early.html): All your options for exiting a lease early — lease transfer, buyout and sell, early termination, and trading in — with the real cost of each.
- [What Happens When Your Car Loan Is Paid Off?](https://autocalchub.com/blog/what-happens-when-car-loan-is-paid-off.html): What actually happens after your final payment — title transfer, lien release, insurance changes, and what to do with the freed-up money.
